reasoning: The market price is 0.037. Forecasting TIME's Person of the Year a year in advance is highly uncertain. While Elon Musk is consistently a prominent public figure and could make headlines through his involvement in the new US administration's DOGE initiative or SpaceX/Tesla milestones, he already won the title in 2021. TIME rarely awards the title multiple times to non-head of state individuals. The baseline chance for any specific individual is quite low, and the market prediction of 3.7% appropriately reflects both his prominence and the historical precedent working against a second win. No major deviation from the freeze value is warranted.
